=====================

The "Tenth Five-Year Plan" National Planning Textbook for General Higher Education  

CAO DING XUE XIAO GUANG GAO ZHUAN YE LI JIAO CAI  

Series Textbooks for Advertising Major in Higher Institutes  

# Modern Market Research  

Dehuan Liu Editor- in- Chief Hao Shen Associate Editor- in- Chief  

Higher Education Press

text_blocks.text_content: It is a "Tenth Five- Year Plan" National Planning Textbook for General Higher Education. This book discusses the concept, proposition, assumption and operation process, and gives special attention to measurement and sampling. This book hits off the drawback of redundant economic contents but insufficient market survey practices in similar domestic textbooks. Instead, it introduces the latest progress of marketing research methods and of statistics.

This book can be used as the textbook for students majoring in Journalism and Communication, and in Advertising. It can also be taken as the elective course materials for students majoring in other liberal arts.

pages.markdown_text:
===================== BASE: torch.Size([1, 256, 1280]) PATCHES: torch.Size([6, 100, 1280]) ===================== ## Brief Introduction It is a "Tenth Five- Year Plan" National Planning Textbook for General Higher Education. This book discusses the concept, proposition, assumption and operation process, and gives special attention to measurement and sampling. This book hits off the drawback of redundant economic contents but insufficient market survey practices in similar domestic textbooks. Instead, it introduces the latest progress of marketing research methods and of statistics. This book can be used as the textbook for students majoring in Journalism and Communication, and in Advertising. It can also be taken as the elective course materials for students majoring in other liberal arts. ## Cataloguing in Publication (CIP) Data Modern Market Research / Editor- in- Chief Dehuan Liu - Beijing: Higher Education Press, June 2005 ISBN 7- 04- 016109- 5 I.
